## AggregateReconstructionResult Class

Wire result returned by a domain service replay endpoint\. The Admin replay path maps
[Status](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionResult.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionResult.Status 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Replay\.AggregateReconstructionResult\.Status') and [ErrorCategory](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionResult.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionResult.ErrorCategory 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Replay\.AggregateReconstructionResult\.ErrorCategory') to RFC 7807 ProblemDetails per the
Failure and HTTP Semantics Matrix in admin\-ui\-aggregate\-state\-replay\-correctness\.
